历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 57014 → 51028 → 51555 → 50509 → 56329, with significant fluctuations in recent years. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 5820 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 56329. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 63, 63, 64, 59, and 43 respectively, with a reduction of about 27% in 2025 compared to 2024. The 2026 plan is 40 students, a further reduction of about 7% from 2025, with two consecutive years of enrollment reduction, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has been steadily rising in recent years: 68th in 2021 → 69th in 2022 → 72nd in 2023 → 69th in 2024 → 66th in 2025 → 61st in 2026, with a steadily improving ranking, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving disputes over food delivery management (mostly neutral events), with limited impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 38th overall (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting considerable application attention. No obvious abnormal admission records have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation: Psychology A, Education A, Marxist Theory A-, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, providing stable appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, and Southwest University offers admissions in these fields. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in this province is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Southwest University is located in Chongqing, and its admissions in Guangdong Province are cross-provincial, with no local preference. In recent years, its Physics Category enrollment proportion in Guangdong has been about 3%, which is a normal cross-provincial ratio.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 56329, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 7% (easing competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing appeal), and the increase in provincial Physics Category candidates by about 3.6% (intensifying competition), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025 (easier to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 54171, with a range of 53671 to 54671.
